title.description: Igoa o le polokalama o lo'o fa'aalia i le ulutala. O se polokalama su'esu'e fua o kuka mai i atunuu eseese o le lalolagi.

subtitle.text: Su'e fua mai atunuu uma o le lalolagi
subtitle.description: Fa'ailoga o lo'o fa'aalia i lalo o le igoa o le polokalama i le ulutala.

heroTitle.description: Ulutala autu i le vaega pito i luga o le itulau autu.

heroSubtitle.text: Siaki fua moni mai umukuka o le lalolagi atoa
heroSubtitle.description: Tusitusiga i lalo o le ulutala pito i luga i le itulau autu.

featuredTitle.description: Ulutala o le vaega i luga atu o le fa'afanua kata fua.

cookingTime.description: Fa'ailoga o le taimi kuka i luga o le kata fua. O le {minutes} o lo'o suia i le numera o minute.

difficulty.description: Fa'ailoga o lo'o fa'aalia i luma o le tulaga o le lavelave i luga o le kata fua.

easy.description: Fa'ailoga o le tulaga lavelave e fa'ailoa ai se fua faigofie.

medium.description: Fa'ailoga o le tulaga lavelave e fa'ailoa ai se fua e feololo le lavelave.

hard.description: Fa'ailoga o le tulaga lavelave e fa'ailoa ai se fua faigatā.

ramenName.description: Igoa o le fua Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Suāu'u a'au pua'a mauoa ma chashu mālūlū, fuamoa mālūlū, ma fettu pasta fou.
ramenDescription.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaName.description: Igoa o le fua Pīsā Margherita.

margheritaDescription.text: Pīsā Neapolitan masani ma tamato San Marzano, mozzarella fou, ma basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Pīsā Margherita.

tacosName.description: Igoa o le fua Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos pua'a marinated ma pineapple, cilantro, ma aniani i luga o tortilla corn.
tacosDescription.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Igoa o le fua Pua'a Pata.

butterChickenDescription.text: Pua'a mālūlū i se sosi tomato ma pata mālūlū ma sua manogi.
butterChickenDescription.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Pua'a Pata.

padThaiName.description: Igoa o le fua Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Fettu pasta fa'afefiloi ma shrimp, tofu, pi, ma sosi tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Pad Thai.

crepesName.description: Igoa o le fua Crepes Faranisi.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes manifinifi ma mālūlū ua tumu i Nutella, tua'i fou, ma sua mamago.
crepesDescription.description: Fa'amatalaga o le fua Crepes Faranisi.

label.description: Fa'ailoga maua mo le lisi liliu gagana i le ulutala.

en.description: Filifiliga o le gagana Igilisi i le lisi liliu gagana.

ja.description: Filifiliga o le gagana Iapani i le lisi liliu gagana.

es.description: Filifiliga o le gagana Sipaniolo i le lisi liliu gagana.
